message:
fix: add flex-wrap + truncation to all card control bars (#8695 Phase 1) (#8735)

- Add flex-wrap gap-y-2 to all ~444 card control bars using
  flex items-center justify-between so they wrap instead of overlap
  when sidebars compress available width
- Make dense stat grids responsive: grid-cols-4 → grid-cols-2
  sm:grid-cols-4 and grid-cols-3 → grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-3
- Skip structural grids (FleetComplianceHeatmap, SudokuGame) where
  columns must stay aligned

Result: no more visual overlap when sidebars expand. Not beautiful at
narrow widths, but functional. Phase 2 (container queries) will add
graceful adaptation.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
